contradictions.text: But here's the thing about structural necessities — they don't take turns.

Power. "The Spirit moved over the waters." If the framework is correct, these three signatures should be distinguishable at every major biblical event — not interchangeable, not redundant, but each doing something the other two cannot. -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Creation (Genesis 1) This is where most people start with Trinity in Scripture, because it's the mos...
Not just creation but sustained coherence .
Then: "but you must not eat from the tree of the knowledge of good and evil" (2:17).
But what it's actualizing has changed.
But the actualization — the real baby — requires the Spirit.
